nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塔帕若斯河
nodes.summary: 塔帕若斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联40种鸟类，包括细嘴隐蜂鸟、塔帕諾斯隱蜂鳥、Amazonian trogon等40种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 马代拉河
nodes.summary: 马代拉河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联55种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、Pale-winged trumpeter等55种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Hoffmanns's woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Hoffmanns's woodcreeper（Hoffmanns's woodcreeper，学名 Dendrocolaptes hoffmannsi），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、人类活动扰动。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Hoffmanns's woodcreeper is found in Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon River between the Rio Madeira and Rio Tapajós

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Hoffmanns's woodcreeper is found in Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon River between the Rio Madeira and Rio Tapajós

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved November 10, 2022 It inhabits humid forest of both terra firme and várzea types

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The primary threat to this species is accelerating deforestation within its restricted range in the Amazon basin

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is thought to be highly sensitive to human disturbance, and its natural rarity and preference for primary forest are likely to make it particularly susceptible to threats." It "occurs in a region that is ornithologically poorly known" and is "rarely seen and little-known"
